case_title: ANTHONY KEITH NORTH VS. BANK OF AMERICA et al

docket_entries.description: QUIET TITLE - REAL PROPERTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF NORTH, ANTHONY KEITH AS TO DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA RECONSTRUCT COMPANY, N.A. DOES 1 TO 20 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR MAY-27-2011 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-22-2011 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         MAY-12-2011

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $350.00 AGAINST ANTHONY KEITH NORTH, FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: JUL-11-2011, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE JUL-24-2011. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

NO APPEARANCE, NOR OBJECTION FILED. CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING SEP-12-2011 AT 1:30PM. THE COURT FINDS NO GOOD CAUSE OR SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE PREVIOUS COURT ORDERS. A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE DUE TO THE HISTORY OF LACK OF COMPLIANCE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-12-2011 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance, nor objection filed. The court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substantial justification for plaintiff's failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Therefore, it is hereby ordered that this matter be dismissed. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-11-2011 Continued To Sep-12-11 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff is sanctioned $350.00 for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 9/12/2011 at 1:30 PM in Department 610. Proceedings not reported. (610)
